            <h2>ICNC Glossary of Key Terms - Arabic</h2>
                          <div class="field-content">
                <p>The first step in creating high-quality translations in the field of civil resistance is translating key terms.</p>
<p>Initially, we developed a list of 91 key terms that had a specific meaning in the field of civil resistance and worked with translators to translate these terms. We have subsequently expanded this list to 159 terms, and ICNC President Hardy Merriman and ICNC Senior Advisor Nicola Barrach have produced a glossary (<a href="https://www.nonviolent-conflict.org/key-terms-study-translation-civil-resistance/">to be published in 2019</a>) that defines each of these terms and provides commentary on each and examples of usage.</p>
<p>You can see standardized translations of key terms in Arabic below.<br>
 </p>
